popularStory.headline: SEWARD FAMILY FOLLOWS:
popularStory.description:
SEWARD FAMILY

10 May 2016


JOHN SEWARD (1580- )
SARA UNKNOWN (1582- )

JOHN SEWARD was born about 1580, of Gloucestershire, England, to unknown parents. He married Sarah Unknown.

We do not know whe …

zh.Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, United S: 美國康乃狄克州米德萊可達勒姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Caleb Seward於1662年3月14日出生在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特時，他的父親Lieut. William Seward36歲，母親Grace Norton30歲。他於1686年7月14日與Lydia Bushnell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1728年8月2日在美國康乃狄克州米德萊可達勒姆享年66歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州米德萊可迪普 利維達勒姆 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Caleb Seward于1662年3月14日出生在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特时，他的父亲Lieut. William Seward36岁，母亲Grace Norton30岁。他于1686年7月14日与Lydia Bushnell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1728年8月2日在美国康涅狄格州米德萊可達勒姆享年66岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州米德萊可迪普 利維達勒姆 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Seward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Seward (Old English Sǣweard, from sǣ ‘sea’ + weard ‘guard’).
English: from the Middle English personal name Siward, Seward (Old English Sigeweard, from sige ‘victory’ + weard ‘guard’, or the equivalent Old Norse Sigwarth).
Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Suaird, Ó Suairt, usually Anglicized as Sword .

variants.name: Sewer
meanings: African American: probably an altered form of English   Seward  .
Swiss German: habitational name for someone from either of two places called Seewen (Schwyz and Solothurn).
Germanized or Americanized form of Slovenian and Croatian   Sever  .

variants.name: Sword
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Seward  .
English: nickname from Middle English sword(e), swerd(e) ‘sword’, perhaps used for a swordsman or armourer.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Suaird, Ó Suairt ‘descendant of Suart’, a personal name derived from Old Norse Sigvarthr ‘victory keeper’, a cognate of Old English Sigeweard; compare Seward 2.

variants.name: Sheward
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Seward  .

nameMeanings.name: Caleb
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by an early Israelite, one of only two of those who set out with Moses from Egypt to live long enough to enter the promised land (Numbers 26:65). The name, which is apparently derived from the word for ‘dog’ in Hebrew, is said in some traditions to symbolize devotion to God. It was popular among the Puritans and was introduced by them to America. In recent years it has become quite popular both in the United States and Britain.

historicEvents.description: New Haven County was created on 10 May 1666, and was named for an English port town called Newhaven, London, England

en.lifeSummary: When Caleb Seward was born on 14 March 1662, in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, United States, his father, Lieut. William Seward, was 36 and his mother, Grace Norton, was 30. He married Lydia Bushnell on 14 July 1686, in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 2 August 1728, in Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 66, and was buried in Durham Cemetery, Deep River, Middlesex, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Caleb Seward est né le 14 mars 1662, à Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis, son père, Lieut. William Seward, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Grace Norton, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lydia Bushnell le 14 juillet 1686, à Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 août 1728, à Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Durham Cemetery, Deep River, Middlesex, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Caleb Seward am 14. März 1662 in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lieut. William Seward 36 und seine Mutter Grace Norton 30. Er hat am 14. Juli 1686 in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Lydia Bushnell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. August 1728 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Durham Cemetery, Deep River, Middlesex, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Caleb Seward è nato il il 14 marzo 1662 nel Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Lieut. William Seward, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Grace Norton, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Lydia Bushnell il 14 luglio 1686, nel Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 agosto 1728, nel Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Durham Cemetery, Deep River, Middlesex, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Caleb Sewardが1662年3月14日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードで生まれた時，父Lieut. William Sewardは36歳，母Grace Nortonは30歳であった。1686年7月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードでLydia Bushnellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1728年8月2日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ミッドレセックスダルハムで66歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ミッドレセックスディーップ リバーダルハム セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드

ko.Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Caleb Seward(이)가 1662년 3월 14일 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lieut. William Seward(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Norton(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1686년 7월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 Lydia Bushnell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1728년 8월 2일 미국 코네티컷 주 미들레세스 뒤람에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 미들레세스 디프 라이버 뒤람 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Caleb Seward nasceu em 14 de março de 1662, em Guilford, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Lieut. William Seward, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Grace Norton, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Lydia Bushnell em 14 de julho de 1686, em Guilford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de agosto de 1728, em Durham, Middlesex, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Durham Cemetery, Deep River, Middlesex, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Caleb Seward родился 14 марта 1662 г. в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Lieut. William Seward было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Norton, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lydia Bushnell 14 июля 1686 г. в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 августа 1728 г. в местности дурам, миддлесекс, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности дурам кеметири, дип ривир, миддлесекс, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Caleb Seward nació el 14 de marzo de 1662, en Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, su papá, Lieut. William Seward, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Grace Norton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lydia Bushnell el 14 de julio de 1686, en Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de agosto de 1728, en Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Durham Cemetery, Deep River, Middlesex, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
